message:
🌱 traefik: Traefik 3.6.0: add option to disable Traefik Hub Demo in dashboard (#1927)

* 🌱 Add traefik: Traefik 3.6.0: add option to disable Traefik Hub Demo in mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add traefik: Traefik 3.6.0: add option to disable Traefik Hub Demo in mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix traefik-12250 mission: mark as declined, correct issueTypes

- Change status from completed to declined (feature was NOT_PLANNED)
- Change issueTypes from feature to declined
- Update resolution to clearly state the Traefik team's decision
- Replace generic kubectl steps with context about the declined request

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "traefik-12250-traefik-3-6-0-add-option-to-disable-traefik-hub-demo-in-dashboard",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "traefik: Traefik 3.6.0: add option to disable Traefik Hub Demo in dashboard",
+    "description": "Traefik 3.6.0: add option to disable Traefik Hub Demo in dashboard. Requested by 49+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "declined",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the feature request",
+        "description": "Users requested an option like `--disable-dashboard-demo` to remove the Traefik Hub demo section from the Traefik dashboard in version 3.6.0 and later."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the Traefik team's decision",
+        "description": "The Traefik maintainers reviewed the request and decided NOT to implement it. Their rationale:\n- The demo menu is collapsed by default\n- It does not interfere with the regular dashboard workflow\n- It provides value for users exploring Traefik Hub capabilities\n\nSee the source issue for the full discussion: https://github.com/traefik/traefik/issues/12250"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Workaround: hide the demo section with CSS (optional)",
+        "description": "If the demo section is unwanted, you can use a custom middleware to inject CSS that hides it, or use a browser extension like uBlock Origin to block the demo section element in the Traefik dashboard UI."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The Traefik team declined this feature request. After review, they decided to keep the demo section in the dashboard. The demo menu is collapsed by default and does not interfere with the regular workflow. The team believes it serves a valuable purpose for users who want to explore Traefik Hub's capabilities directly from their open-source installation. No option to disable it will be added.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "traefik",
+      "community",
+      "ingress",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "traefik"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "declined"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik/issues/12250",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik"
+    },
+    "reactions": 49,
+    "comments": 4,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with traefik installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:57:48.072Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
